property_address: 2247 Menalto Avenue, East Palo Alto, CA

base_items.task: Apply rock mulch around outside lawn perimeter
base_items.notes: Despite being called mulch on the original scope, finish material is rock. Confirm rock type/size with Graeham before purchasing.

base_items.task: Fill in missing rock in middle yard area
base_items.notes: Match existing rock type and color where rock is currently missing.

base_items.task: Trim trees around exterior of property
base_items.notes: Shape, clear deadwood and crossing branches. Haul away all cuttings.
Suggest 2-3 medium evergreen shrubs to fill bare spots. Confirm species and count with contractor.

base_items.task: Power wash front yard and backyard hardscape
base_items.notes: Driveway, walkways, patio, and any concrete or pavers. Aim for listing-ready appearance.

base_items.task: Complete clean of ADU in backyard
base_items.notes: Full interior + exterior clean. Floors, windows, bathrooms, kitchen, all surfaces. Should look move-in ready.
Rake, blow, and haul away. Front, back, and side yards.
Brush, deep clean, refresh appearance. No replacement - cleaning only.

option_groups.label: Middle yard surface treatment
option_groups.notes: Pick one. Each option is priced separately so the client can compare cost vs. look.

options.name: Option 1: Bark
options.notes: Standard bark mulch. Lowest cost, refreshes easily, needs replenishing every couple years.

options.name: Option 2: Flagstone with gravel
options.notes: Flagstone pieces set in decomposed granite or pea gravel. Highest cost, most polished look, longest lasting.

options.name: Option 3: Mulch (wood-chip)
options.notes: Wood-chip mulch alternative to bark. Mid-cost, soft look, breaks down over time.
